name: plan2net/webp
description: Drop-in WebP delivery for TYPO3 images — automatic, no URL or template changes

suggest.ext-ffi: Required by VipsConverter — jcupitt/vips 2.x calls libvips via PHP FFI
suggest.jcupitt/vips: PHP binding for libvips (2.x, FFI-based), required by VipsConverter
suggest.typo3/cms-frontend: Required only when the PhpGdConverter backend is used; ships TYPO3\CMS\Frontend\Imaging\GifBuilder
suggest.typo3/cms-install: Required only if you run the UpgradeWizard that clears legacy tx_webp_failed rows during a configuration_hash column resize
suggest.typo3/cms-scheduler: Required only when async = 1; provides the scheduler task that drains tx_webp_queue out-of-band
